title: Section 35B
content: 1[35B. Power of Reserve Bank to exempt housing finance institution.-- (1) The Reserve Bank, on being satisfied that it is necessary so to do, may declare by notification that all or any of the provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to a housing finance institution which is a company or a group of such housing finance institutions either generally or for such period as may be specified, subject to such conditions, limitations or restrictions as it may think fit to impose. (2) Every notification made under this section shall be laid, as soon as may be after it is made, before each House of Parliament.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 167, ibid., for section 35B (w.e.f. 09-08-2019).
